subcodes.first_line: This Book hath been sent down through grace from the presence of God, the Most High, unto him who hath been named 'Abdu'l-Ghaní, that the verses of his Lord may draw him unto the station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالفضل من لدی الله العلی لمن سمی بعبدالغنی لتجذبه آیات ربه الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
